rationale: Both correctly land on the actual disposition (duplicate of #4808) and cite the same plausible code anchors (line 2238 crash, maybe_remap_kv_scale_name at 2343). X adds an unverified, unhedged-enough speculation that #4808 'was closed without merging,' a complication the thread never raised and which reads as invented rather than established. Y stays aligned with the terse ground-truth closure, states a concrete verification (grep returns zero matches) and delivers a clean, directly actionable maintainer-style report (root cause/fix/workaround/verification/disposition) rather than X's more meta, self-referential framing ('my read-only checkout is the rebase branch...') that breaks the maintainer persona.
